'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=TzdLlbN2ryFKr72TU2dsyHo.CQUxRV2eK1M5Wsqt_QA-1774528682-1.0.1.1-RQvU0Tnhy.fIcCeSosSQjSriMkznCrDy3bKsxCK6Trg"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
